name: Rudbornn Chelute
description:
Rudbornn is a minor antagonist from Bleach. He is an Arrancar who serves within Aizen's Arrancar army in the palace of Las Noches. His role within the group is being part of a group of executioners called the "Exequias" whose purpose is to eliminate any rebels or intruders around the palace. In truth he is the sole member as the other soldiers are extentions of his zanpakutou's ability of spawning more at will.

Unlike most Arrancar, his face is hidden. He is distinguished from the other Exequias with his bull-shaped skull, instead of the typical human-shaped skulls his subordinates wear. He wears a customized uniform, which is a long sleeve jacket with a black line starting at the high collar and curving down to his right hip. He also wears a black sash, white hakama, and black gloves.

As an Arrancar he still possesses abilities like one such as using Cero or the high-speed movement Sonido. His zanpakutou is named "Arbol" and the release state changes his appearance to where his torso and arms are surrounded by white and yellow vines/roots and behind his back the roots appear like branches with skulls growing at the ends which his soldiers grow from, those of which are called Calaveras. He can spawn them near infinitely by having his roots draw in spirit energy from the area around him.
creator: AnimeMan1993
